scope: v215 consumer verification checklist historical compatibility

guards: v179 live and fixture snapshots do not contain the v215 checklist endpoint
v184 live and fixture snapshots do not contain the v215 checklist endpoint
current rolling registry keeps the checklist after the v211 bundle and before read-only catalog
